creator: roman@xpert.com
text:
I believe it closes ports/22514 as well.
I don't see a point in adding ftp://ftp.freeamp.org/pub/musicbrainz/ to
MASTER_SITES since ftp.freeamp.org and ftp.musicbrainz.org is the same site.

--Roman Shterenzon, UNIX System Administrator and Consultant
